item.name: Iq Br'aax Sailfin
item.description:
An elegant freshwater fish of the Iq Br'aax reservoir that sports a splendid, flowing dorsal fin.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This elegant freshwater fish effortlessly glides through the water, using the flowing sail-like fin that runs the length of its body as a means of propulsion. It is often observed skirting the edges of the tranquil cenote it calls home.
